title: Hody’s Officers Remain
description: On pages 11–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Jinbe, Unknown person #6. The core beat is hody’s officers remain.
scene: The scene follows hody’s officers remain, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Jinbe, Unknown person #6.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aaaa Hhhh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: URGH HA...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Madame Shirley!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ridiculous nonsense ...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you trying to imply, Shirley?!!!!!!!!!!! trying to take some kind of petty revenge?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'm not like your brother, Shirley!!!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Oh, sure, when I was a kid, your brother arlong was the idol of the whole fish-man district!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Madame !!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we've moved beyond that. We've become powerful!!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: At this stage, the name of the Arlong pirates is nothing but an empty symbol for us to rally around!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: · Look at what we've accomplished!! Look at how we've grown!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've been working towards this moment for ten long years!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You want to hear something good....?!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: You remember the queen of this kingdom? That wretch Otohime, who you all adored so much?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Well, I'm the one who killed her!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: You killed Otohime ?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Is that really true, Captain ?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No way....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But what about the human assassin ....?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Remember you haven't

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Haha hah...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: KyakyahH!! You're all idiots for not realising sooner!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that day... I paid a human pirate to set fire to that box of signatures.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's on fire!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: While everyone was distracted by the blaze, I murdered Otohime!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And finally, I shot the human pirate I'd hired dead...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This human has murdered our Queen!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...and framed him as the killer!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Curse you, hody!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Father!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: UURG !!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Aaaa AHIH!!!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She was in my way!!! You hear that, Shirahoshii ?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: that filthy whore who thought taking revenge on humans was "wrong"!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who preached to the whole damn island about making peace with them, and even came close to achieving it!! I hated everything about her!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How dare you talk to her high-ness like that!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This is too cruel!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your mother was a worthless wretch who deserved to die!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: So I killed her!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm the one who took her filthy life!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...I knew it was you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Shirahoshii ...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: Fish-Man District, "Noah"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: H-H- H -

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: H - Hold on - hold on a moment!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Cap'n decken !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WH - WH - What exactly is going on here?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you really have to ask?! Ba Hohohohohohohoh!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: I just gave this mighty ship "Noah", said to have been built by the people of fish-man Island in an age long gone..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...a nice good shove with my right hand!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In other words... I just threw this ship...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...Straight towards Shirahoshi!!!!!!! Bahohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohohoh

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's really moving!!! This is CRAA AAAZY!!!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: The Noah is half the size of fish-man island itself!!! There's nowhere left for her to run or hide, and nobody can stop this ship now!!!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: My beloved Shirahoshii can perish along with the whole of fish-man Island!!! Farewell, Shirahoshioshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshoshi!!!!!!!!!! farewell,

summary: Hody’s Officers Remain. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
